transit_rules.prediction: Saturn is transiting your Moon sign (Peak of Sade Sati). A period of profound transformation, hard work, and potentially high pressure. Focus on discipline.
Saturn is in the 12th house from your Moon (Beginning of Sade Sati). Increased expenses and a shift toward inner contemplation or withdrawal are likely.
Saturn is in the 2nd house from your Moon (Final phase of Sade Sati). Family matters and financial stabilization will be the core focus.
Jupiter is in a highly favorable transit from your Moon. This brings expansion, wisdom, and beneficial opportunities in your life.
Ashtama Shani: Saturn is transiting the 8th house from your Moon. Caution is advised in health and inherited matters. Avoid major risks.
